title: Use a Reusable Water Bottle
description: Bring your own reusable water bottle instead of buying plastic bottles today

title: Take Public Transport
description: Use public transportation, bike, or walk instead of driving alone

title: Meatless Monday
description: Go vegetarian or vegan for the entire day to reduce your carbon footprint

title: Recycle Properly
description: Sort and recycle all your waste correctly today

title: Plant a Tree
description: Plant a tree in your community or donate to a tree-planting organization

title: Start Composting
description: Set up a composting system for your food waste

title: Switch to LED Bulbs
description: Replace all traditional bulbs in your home with energy-efficient LED bulbs

title: Zero Waste Week
description: Produce zero waste for an entire week

title: Beach Cleanup Event
description: Organize or participate in a beach or park cleanup event with at least 10 people

title: Install Solar Panels
description: Install solar panels on your home or business

title: Go Car-Free for a Month
description: Commit to not using a personal car for 30 days

title: Community Garden Project
description: Start or join a community garden project in your neighborhood
